windows.embed_text: a white bowl with a white liquid inside | a white mixer with a white bowl on top | a white bowl with a white cloth on it | a snowboarder is falling off the slope | a glass filled with ice and water
windows.embed_text_v2: Whips wax to fluffy white peaks with electric hand mixer in glass bowl, then bare hands transfer whipped wax into clear piping bag using red silicone spatula on dark gray surface.
windows.summary_v2: Whips wax to fluffy white peaks with an electric hand mixer, then scrapes the whipped wax into a clear piping bag using a red silicone spatula for later piping.

tags_v2.action: whip wax and transfer to piping bag

seconds_v2.desc: Extreme close-up of a glossy white whipped wax mixture swirling in a bowl as an electric hand mixer's beaters churn it, creating textured ribbons of soft peaks.
Close-up of two stainless steel mixer beaters spinning into the thick whipped white wax, blending it into a smooth fluffy mass.
Continued whipping, the beater shafts dip into glossy white peaks, producing rippled whipped texture across the bowl.
Same beater action, the whipped white wax shows folds and craters as the mixer aerates it further.
Wide overhead shot of a clear glass bowl on a dark gray surface holding a mound of whipped white wax, the hand mixer set beside it with beaters resting in the bowl.
Same overhead shot, bare hands enter from the bottom holding a clear piping bag and red silicone spatula; they begin scraping whipped wax from the bowl into the bag.
Hands continue spooning whipped white wax into the upright clear piping bag with the red spatula, bowl tilted slightly.
Hands work the spatula, transferring more whipped wax from the bowl into the piping bag for piping.
Continued transfer, bag now holds a visible portion of whipped white wax, spatula scrapes the inside of the bowl clean.

a cake with pink frosting on top
a cake with pink frosting on top

a close up of a pink cake with a piece missing

windows.embed_text: a pink wall with a black and white paint | a close up of a pink paint with a black background | a cake with pink frosting on top | a cake with pink frosting being made into a cake | a close up of a pink cake with a piece missing
windows.embed_text_v2: Smooths pink whipped wax over yellow cylindrical wax candle base using metal palette spatula on white plate, frosting-style decorative finishing coating the candle sides smoothly.
windows.summary_v2: Smooths pink whipped wax around a cylindrical yellow wax candle base with a metal spatula, frosting-like finishing of the candle's outer surface.

seconds_v2.desc: Extreme close-up of a textured pink whipped surface; a metal palette knife/spatula edge presses into the side, lifting a chunk of pink wax to smooth out the coating.
Same close-up of the swirled pink whipped wax surface, spatula tip just visible at the right edge.
Side view: a pale yellow cylindrical wax base sits on a white plate with a thick layer of pink whipped wax piled on top; a small scoop has been carved out of the pink revealing the yellow underneath.
Closer side angle as a metal spatula scoops away excess pink whipped wax from the side of the candle, exposing yellow wax beneath.
Spatula presses flat against the pink coating, smoothing it down the side of the cylindrical candle form.
Side profile of the candle with the spatula no longer in frame; pink whipped wax now coats most of the surface, slight unevenness remaining.
Close angle of the spatula working a vertical line on the pink-coated side, smoothing the whipped wax around the candle.
Side profile shows a more uniformly smoothed pink-coated cylindrical candle on the white plate.
Final smoothed-out pink whipped wax coating on the cylindrical candle, presenting a frosting-like finish on the side.
